text:
Ghost in a Jar was a false character, portrayed by the Alien Parasites. He is a tiny green ghost, inside of a jar. He appeared in the episode Total Rickall.

Ghost in the Jar's character entered the household after Rick had a flashback to the barbecue, along with the dozens of other parasite characters. Reverse Giraffe claims to have saved Ghost in a Jar's life in Vietnam. Ghost in a Jar was one of the last parasites to be killed, When Rick makes a joke after killing the butler Mr. Beauregard, the camera cuts to Ghost in a Jar; Rick opens the jar, dumps out the Ghost, and shoots him.

Ghost in a Jar is very cool and fun-loving. He is best known for how he can appreciate the jokes and puns people tell no matter how cheesy, complex, forced, or unfunny they are.
